tasks.title: CS101 Final Coding Project Submission
tasks.description: Submit the GitHub repository link and writeup for the React portfolio project. Needs to include responsive design and state persistence.
tasks.priority_reason: Critical: Due in under 3 hours, weighted 25% of overall course grade.

tasks.title: Pay Electricity and Wifi Bills
tasks.description: Pay outstanding utility balances to avoid service disruption or late penalty charges.
tasks.priority_reason: High: Direct financial late fee penalty if missed; quick win task.

tasks.title: Prepare for Frontend Engineer Technical Interview
tasks.description: Review system design architectures, React performance hooks, and practice whiteboard algorithms.
tasks.priority_reason: High: Huge professional opportunity. Large scope, needs progressive study blocks.

subtasks.title: Review React fiber and rendering lifecycles
Draft answers for common architectural questions

tasks.title: Weekly Sync with Team Lead
tasks.description: Align on core product sprints, provide demo files, and review next milestones.
tasks.priority_reason: Medium: Standard status check, preparation blocks are low effort.

tasks.title: Grocery Shopping & Meal Prep
tasks.description: Buy fresh vegetables, lean proteins, and batch cook healthy meals for the workweek.
tasks.priority_reason: Low: Highly flexible, can be completed during evening downtime.

schedule_blocks.title: Frontend Interview Prep - Deep Focus Block
Prep for Weekly Sync with Team Lead

patterns.title: Coding Tasks Estimation Anchor
patterns.description: You consistently take ~40% longer on coding tasks than initially planned. DeadlineGuardian has automatically padded upcoming project blocks.

patterns.title: Golden Study Hours Detected
patterns.description: Your focus peaks between 9:00 AM and 11:30 AM. Creative and complex coding tasks are prioritised here for maximum efficiency.

conversations.content: System initialized. Proactive Guardian agent connected and monitoring active threats.

Hello! I'm your DeadlineGuardian. I've analyzed your upcoming commitments and noted that your **CS101 Final Coding Project Submission** is due in less than 3 hours. I've auto-scheduled a study block in 30 minutes to ensure you push your code safely. Let's tackle it!

autonomous_logs.title: Urgent: CS101 Final Project Due in 87 Minutes
autonomous_logs.description: Triggered an escalating priority reminder for your CS101 Final Coding Project submission.
autonomous_logs.details: ALERT: Your CS101 Final Coding Project (worth 25% of your grade) is due at 06:49 AM. You have 3 pending subtasks: 1) Complete README documentation, 2) Test responsive viewport breaks, and 3) Submit link on Canvas. Your active schedule block is currently running. Ensure you submit before the window closes!

autonomous_logs.title: AI Schedule Re-Balanced
autonomous_logs.description: Optimized calendar blocks for 6 pending tasks around calendar constraints.
autonomous_logs.details: I have prioritized your urgent CS101 Final Project immediately to ensure you submit before your 6:49 AM deadline. Next, I scheduled your high-priority Frontend Interview Prep during your 'Golden Study Hours' (9:00 AM - 11:30 AM) for maximum focus, splitting the remaining study time into a secondary afternoon block to prevent burnout. Quick administrative tasks like paying bills are slotted right after lunch, and your Weekly Sync prep is perfectly timed to finish just minutes before your actual meeting. Finally, we wrap up the day with grocery shopping and meal prep during your evening downtime.

autonomous_logs.title: Critical Deadline Alert: CS101 Project Due in 2.5 Hours
autonomous_logs.description: Triggered an urgent workspace-prep nudge for your CS101 Final Coding Project as your remaining runway buffer has shrunk to just 29 minutes.
autonomous_logs.details: ALERT: Your 'CS101 Final Coding Project Submission' is due at 06:49 AM (in 2 hours, 28 minutes). With a 120-minute estimated completion time and three pending subtasks, your scheduled focus block starting at 04:49 AM (in 29 minutes) is your absolute last window to submit on time. Clear all distractions and prepare your IDE now.

autonomous_logs.title: Autonomous Study Block Auto-Scheduled
autonomous_logs.description: Identified a high-priority threat: CS101 Final Coding Project submission is due in 3 hours with no planned schedule block. Auto-scheduled from 10:00 PM to 11:30 PM.
autonomous_logs.details: Assigned CS101 study block in open slot preceding official deadline.
